title: The Painted Woman
writer: Guy Bolton, Leon Gordon, Alfred C. Kennedy
actors: Spencer Tracy, Peggy Shannon, William 'Stage' Boyd
plot: After becoming involved in a killing, Kiddo gets on board Boyton's ship. When he learns what happened he dumps her on a South Sea island. Tom Brian marries her, and when Boynton returns he's furious (he wanted to marry her). When ...
